name: Ovo-lacto: Spinach-Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic, sauté until soft.
3. Add chopped spinach and cook for about 2 minutes until wilted.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, spinach mixture, eggs, milk, cheddar cheese, parsley, tamari sauce, salt, nutmeg, cayenne, sunflower seeds, and paprika.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes, or until set.
7. Turn off the heat and let cool slightly before serving.
